title: Istanbul Metro Logo For MTR Mod
description: Istanbul Metro Logo replacement For MTR Mod
body:
An Istanbul Metro Logo replacement for MTR Mod (it replaces the MTR logo in game)
**Just download the resource pack and have fun!**
![Istanbul Metro Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/156d8d33a132d5a0ebd3b75014111341b99219a4_0.webp)
